# Open Magi Docs

Magi Agent is the programmable AI agent that gets real work done under your
rules.

Start here:

- docs/README.md
- docs/getting-started.md
- docs/quickstart.md
- docs/cli.md
- docs/configuration.md
- docs/runtime.md
- docs/tools.md
- docs/contracts.md
- docs/integrations.md
- docs/security.md
- docs/troubleshooting.md
